Connect to GitHub

Not connected — Publish buttons will fall back to Download until this is set up.

Saved only on this device, never uploaded anywhere. Create one at github.com → Settings → Developer settings → Fine-grained tokens, scoped to just this one repo with "Contents: Read and write" access.

Change your PIN

Saved only on this device — not uploaded anywhere. You'll still always wrap it in stars to unlock (e.g. *1234*), on this device or any other.
